items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Luce series mini tri-fold wallet. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this petite mini zip wallet with design essence. Brown leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and brown pattern. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, brown leather trim, light gold-tone metal hardware, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo zip pull.

This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG accessories, creating a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, cloud-patterned fabric lining with GG details. Inside: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments.
Model: 291105.
Size: 19(W) x 10(H) x 2.5cm(D)
Color: Black/Stamped G original leather.
Made in Italy
